message:
fix(mux): fix 2 failing tab layout tests after default cycle change

Tabs now ship with a default layout cycle (line 1564), which broke two
tests that assumed no cycle was set:

1. swap_without_cycle_returns_none → swap_default_cycle_applies_layout:
   Updated to expect swap_to_next_layout() returns Some, since the
   default cycle is always present.

2. swap_layout_pane_count_mismatch_overflow_stacks:
   PaneStack holds ALL panes in a slot (visible + hidden), so the
   visible pane appears in both tree_panes and stacked_panes. Changed
   from additive count to set union for unique pane counting, and
   updated the stacked assertion (3 = 1 visible + 2 overflow).

Validated: 299 mux tests pass (was 297 pass + 2 fail).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
